key.name: show-cpu
key.summary: Show CPU in the top bar

key.name: show-gpu
key.summary: Show GPU in the top bar

key.name: show-ram
key.summary: Show memory in the top bar

key.name: show-disk
key.summary: Show disk in the top bar (busiest disk)

key.name: show-net
key.summary: Show network rates in the top bar

key.name: show-temps
key.summary: Show temperatures next to loads in the top bar

key.name: panel-position
key.summary: Where in the top bar the indicator sits
